title: Integration Gate - Create Campaign
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-019' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-019' to ingest requirements
Manually spin up the application stack (frontend and backend)
Perform end-to-end manual testing for the Create Campaign flow
Review the integrated behavior against the original FCHAIN requirements
definition_of_done: Application stack runs locally without errors
Manual end-to-end testing confirms the Epic is functional
No critical regressions found in integrated components
